overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Mafia III) depicting a character walking through a residential neighborhood at night. The character passes traditional wooden shotgun houses with illuminated porches, vintage 1960s vehicles, and occasional pedestrians in an atmospheric New Orleans-inspired suburban setting.

events.description: vintage car drives past on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past wooden houses with illuminated porches and mailboxes

notable_agents.action: pedestrian holding umbrella walking toward camera on the sidewalk

white mailbox on post beside the sidewalk

wooden house with green painted exterior and porch

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a residential sidewalk at night, passing traditional wooden houses with illuminated porches. A mailbox stands on the left near the curb, while overhead power lines crisscross above. Around 7 seconds, a vintage car passes on the street, and toward the end of the segment, the character encounters a pedestrian with an umbrella walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with varied house colors

events.description: second vintage car drives past on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk past dark wooden and red-painted houses along the sidewalk

entered.detail: weathered dark wood house with illuminated windows
vibrant red house with black wrought iron porch railings
large metal truss bridge visible in the distant background

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the residential sidewalk, passing a dark wooden house followed by a distinctive red house with black iron railings. A vintage car drives past on the left around 18 seconds. Toward the end of the segment, a large metal arch bridge becomes visible in the distant background, indicating an approaching intersection.

events.description: approaching open intersection as sidewalk curves toward the street crossing
character walks past parked white vintage car on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking toward the intersection with the metal bridge visible ahead, passing parked vehicles

entered.detail: small commercial building with illuminated signage across the intersection
white vintage sedan parked along the curb near the intersection
open intersection where the residential street meets a larger road

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a wide intersection, transitioning from the enclosed residential street to a more open area. A gas station building becomes visible across the street, and the metal arch bridge appears closer on the left. Around 38 seconds, the character passes a parked white vintage car as the sidewalk curves along the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk along intersection with parked vehicles

events.description: red car drives past on the street to the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past the intersection, following another pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: single-story gray house with green garage door and white picket fence

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the sidewalk past the intersection, with a gray house and white picket fence on the right. Another pedestrian is visible walking ahead in the same direction. The metal arch bridge recedes into the distance on the left, and a red car drives past on the street around 52 seconds as the character moves deeper into the residential neighborhood.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a nighttime residential neighborhood that transitions from an enclosed street of wooden houses to a wide intersection before returning to a suburban stretch. It begins along a sidewalk lined with traditional wooden homes and illuminated porches, passing a mailbox and overhead power lines as a vintage car drives by and a pedestrian with an umbrella crosses the path. As the character continues, the scenery shifts past a dark house and a distinctive red home with iron railings, while the horizon opens up to reveal a large metal arch bridge in the distance. The scene then expands into a wide intersection where the camera passes a parked white vintage car and a gas station building, with the bridge looming closer on the left. Finally, the view narrows again as the character moves past a gray house with a white picket fence and a red car, following another pedestrian deeper into the neighborhood as the bridge recedes behind them.
